Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
Laboratory results are largely within normal limits. Notable findings include mild hypoglycemia (glucose 64 mg/dL) and low total CO₂ (20.3 mmol/L), which may suggest mild metabolic acidosis or compensation; clinical correlation is advised. Renal function, lipid profile, and microalbumin/creatinine ratio are unremarkable. No evidence of significant renal or metabolic derangement.
